title: Treadmill Belt Lubricant 100 ml | Pure Silicone Oil 350 cSt – Belt & Deck Lubricant for Home & Commercial Treadmills, Low Friction, Clean Drip-Tip
features: SMOOTHER, QUIETER RUN – Reduces belt–deck friction to help stabilise speed and cut motor load.
PURE SILICONE 350 CST – Optimised viscosity for controlled spread under the belt without soaking or fling.
EXTENDS BELT & MOTOR LIFE – Helps prevent heat build-up and premature wear for longer service intervals.
CLEAN, LOW-RESIDUE – Non-gumming, odour-light, and safe for most modern belt materials when used correctly.
HANDY 100 ML DRIP-TIP – Precise application for home users and gym techs; enough for multiple services.
description: Keep your treadmill running smoothly with Atkinson Oil Co. Treadmill Oil 100 ml. This pure silicone oil (350 cSt) lays down a consistent, low-friction film between the belt and deck, helping to reduce heat, noise and power draw. Used as part of routine servicing, it supports belt tracking, protects deck coatings and can extend the lifespan of both belt and drive components. The 100 ml drip-tip bottle makes accurate, mess-free application straightforward—ideal for home gyms and light commercial settings. How to Use Switch off and unplug the treadmill. Gently lift the belt edge at the mid-length on one side. Apply 5–10 ml evenly along the deck surface (front to back). Repeat on the other side if required (total typical dose 10–20 ml). Power on and walk at 2–3 km/h for 3–5 minutes to distribute; wipe any visible excess from the belt edges. Service interval: every 3 months (home use) or 40–60 hours; increase frequency in hot/dusty environments. Recommended Uses Belt–deck lubrication on home and commercial treadmills Routine maintenance after cleaning, belt replacement or noise/heat increase Specific Uses for Product Lowering belt friction to reduce motor load and temperature Helping maintain consistent speed and quiet operation Supporting longer belt, deck and motor life with regular care Caution For treadmill belt–deck lubrication only. Do not apply to rollers, drive belts, running surface, or electronic components. Keep off shoes and walking surface—wipe spills immediately (slip hazard). Check manufacturer guidance for silicone compatibility before use. Keep out of reach of children. Avoid eye contact and prolonged skin exposure. Store sealed in a cool, dry place.
